gpu: X.Org Radeon RX 580 Series (POLARIS10, DRM 3.23.0, 4.16.0-2-amd64, LLVM 6.0.1)
notes: The game does not accept any keypresses. At the very start you have to enter your name. You can't do anything unless you write something, which you can't. Mouse clicks work fine, though.
title: Reprisal Universe

notes: It is possible to enter in a name, just highlight the existing text and delete it.  The game runs ok overall but their are some minor graphical glitches that are annoying.
title: Reprisal Universe
